transcript:
Speaker A (AI): कल कहाँ गए थे? [Where did you go yesterday?] 
Speaker B (Human): I went to माल yesterday. 
Speaker A (AI): माल? प्रोनन्सिएशन थोड़ा गड़बड़ हो गया। It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. [Mall? Pronunciation is a bit off. It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday.] 
Speaker A (AI): कल क्या खाया? [What did you eat yesterday?] 
Speaker B (Human): I eat पीजा खाया। [I eat pizza.] 
Speaker A (AI): पीजा? नहीं, Pizza! और बात कल की है, इसलिए eat नहीं, ate. I ate pizza. [Pizza? No, Pizza! And it's about yesterday, so not eat, ate. I ate pizza.] 
Speaker A (AI): ट्रेन कहाँ से पकड़ते हो? [Where do you catch the train from?] 
Speaker B (Human): I pick train from railway इस्टेशना. 
Speaker A (AI): Pick? Pick मतलब उठाना। Catch मतलब पकड़ना। और इस्टेशन नहीं, Station. I catch the train from the railway station. [Pick? Pick means to lift. Catch means to catch. And not 'istation', Station. I catch the train from the railway station.] 
Speaker B (Human): मेरा प्रोनन्सिएशन वीक है। [My pronunciation is weak.] 
Speaker A (AI): कोई बात नहीं। AI Teacher ट्राई किया क्या? [No problem. Did you try AI Teacher?] 
Speaker B (Human): वो महँगा होगा ना? [That must be expensive, right?] 
Speaker A (AI): बिल्कुल नहीं। नॉर्मल इंग्लिश क्लासेस से 7 गुना सस्ता है। इसलिए 50 लाख लोग MySivi पर प्रैक्टिस कर रहे हैं। [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing on MySivi.] 
Speaker B (Human): लेकिन टाइम नहीं मिलेगा मुझे। [But I won't get time.] 
Speaker A (AI): रोज़ सिर्फ 15-20 मिनट प्रैक्टिस काफी है। धीरे-धीरे कॉन्फिडेंट हो जाओगे। [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. Gradually you will become confident.] 
Speaker B (Human): Wow, कैसे ज्वाइन करूँ? [Wow, how do I join?] 
Speaker A (AI): नीचे इंस्टॉल का बटन दबाओ। MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करो, साइन अप करो और प्रैक्टिस शुरू करो। ट्रायल सिर्फ ₹1 में 3 दिनों के लिए है। [Press the install button below. Install MySivi app, sign up and start practicing. Trial is for just ₹1 for 3 days.] 
Speaker C (Voiceover): Install Now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो. [Click on Install Now and download MySivi app.]
on_screen_text:
कल कहाँ गए थे [Where did you go yesterday] 
I went to माल yesterday 
माल प्रोनन्सिएशन थोड़ा गड़बड़ हो गया [Mall pronunciation is a bit off] 
कल क्या खाया [What did you eat yesterday] 
I eat पीजा खाया [I eat pizza] 
पीजा नहीं Pizza! [Not Pizza, Pizza!] 
ट्रेन कहाँ से पकड़ते हो [Where do you catch the train from] 
I pick train from railway इस्टेशना 
Pick मतलब उठाना। Catch मतलब पकड़ना [Pick means lift. Catch means catch] 
मेरा प्रोनन्सिएशन वीक है [My pronunciation is weak] 
AI Teacher ट्राई किया क्या [Did you try AI Teacher] 
क्लासेस से 7 गुना सस्ता है [7 times cheaper than classes] 
रोज सिर्फ 15-20 मिनट प्रैक्टिस काफी है [Just 15-20 mins daily practice is enough] 
MySivi Pro फायदे [MySivi Pro benefits] 
२४/७ तुमचा Personal AI English Teacher [24/7 your Personal AI English Teacher] 
Start Trial at ₹1 
MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: The ad features an AI robot avatar correcting a young man's English pronunciation and grammar mistakes in real-time. The AI avatar introduces the MySivi app as an affordable, convenient alternative to traditional English classes, requiring only 15-20 minutes of daily practice. The ad concludes with a call-to-action to download the app and start a 3-day trial for just ₹1.
